notes: The workspace only contained 100 direct pipeline-generated Socratic samples in episodes.jsonl.
To reach 150 existing Socratic samples, the remaining 50 were taken from archived socratic_hints in datset_for_SFT.json.
The 150 sft_reference rows are disjoint from the 50 archive rows above.
All labels were regenerated with a stricter offline rubric instead of copying the current judge outputs.
Train/val split is built from connected components over code_hash and hint_hash, so neither hash overlaps across splits.
task_is_valid_for_socratic is no longer constant; syntax-invalid and generic runtime-invalid tasks are labeled false.
